vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi diện mạo kiến trúc
vocab.example: The campus has undergone a complete architectural metamorphosis, shifting from brutalist concrete blocks to glass-fronted, modern structures.

vocab.meaning: sự phổ biến rộng rãi của học tập trực tuyến
vocab.example: The ubiquity of e-learning platforms has fundamentally altered the traditional classroom dynamic since my primary school days.

vocab.meaning: các sáng kiến có ý thức bảo vệ môi trường
vocab.example: My old school now champions various eco-conscious initiatives, such as solar-powered laboratories and extensive recycling programs.

vocab.meaning: sự hòa nhập đa văn hóa
vocab.example: There is a much stronger emphasis on multicultural inclusivity today, reflecting a more diverse student body than in the past.
The old, dusty science rooms have been replaced by cutting-edge laboratories equipped with high-tech sensors and VR tools.

vocab.meaning: tối ưu hóa các công việc hành chính
vocab.example: Digital portals now streamline administrative tasks, allowing parents and students to access grades and schedules instantaneously.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung vào đào tạo nghề
vocab.example: The school has expanded its vocational training focus, providing students with practical skills in coding and digital design.
The addition of communal gardens and art installations has greatly enhanced the aesthetic appeal of the learning environment.

vocab.meaning: các trạm làm việc nhóm/hợp tác
vocab.example: Instead of isolated desks, the library now features collaborative workstations designed to foster teamwork among peers.

vocab.meaning: các quy trình an ninh nghiêm ngặt
vocab.example: School security has been heightened with rigorous safety protocols, including biometric entry systems and surveillance cameras.
